case_title: CAESAR ALEXZANDER VS. JP MORGAN CHASE AND CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ALEXZANDER, CAESAR AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE AND CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED AUG-06-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE AND CO.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2010 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE AND CO.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-24-2010 APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS DETAINED BY THE COURT. MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-24-2010 BY COMM. PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALEXZANDER, CAESAR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE AND CO. PLAINTIFF'S RECOVERY REST WITH THE MERCHANT. THE COURT DOES NOT FIND LIABILITY ON THE CREDIT CARD COMPANY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
